benefits.description: Lost 100 pounds in 10 months (Nov 2022 - Oct 2023) on Tirzepatide (brand Mounjaro), from 280 to 180 lbs. Current protocol aims for slower fat loss with muscle building.

side_effects.description: Lost a LOT of muscle due to restricted diet during rapid weight loss phase
Lost enough hair that part widened about a half inch
Some loose skin (not a ton, but still not ideal)

protocol_notes: Previous rapid weight loss protocol (Nov 2022-Oct 2023): Started 2.5mg Tirzepatide for ~6 months, then 5mg for extended period, briefly at 7.5mg for 1 month. Lost 100lbs in ~10 months (280→180), continued to lowest weight of 145lbs (Mar 2024). Took 6-month break from Tirzepatide. Now resumed at slower pace with current stack: 5mg Tirzepatide weekly + 1mg Retatrutide weekly. Current weight 165lbs, targeting ~150lbs with focus on muscle building. Reflective that rapid weight loss was not achieved healthily and wishes had gone slower.
